Cultivation  practices:
At the time of harvest of plant crop sharp knives for cutting the clump to the ground level need to be used.

Cleaning of field and removal of dead canes, trash etc., where ever they are in the field.

Breaking the clods by intercultivation between the furrows with the plough.

Stubble shaving has to be done with sharp knives to the ground level. The advantage of stubble shaving includes the removal of generated old buds and rejuvenation of new buds. Care should be taken not to disturb the clump while stubble shaving.
